items.title: Some Hawks news...
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Some Hawks news...

During a workout on last week, Mouhamed Gueye sustained a fractured left foot. 

He underwent surgery yesterday and will be re-evaluated in 3-4 months.

items.title: FINAL: #Magic 99, Sixers 92
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
FINAL: #Magic 99, Sixers 92

Jase Richardson scores 25 points (10 for 15 FGs) with 4 assists and 3 steals. Alex Morales records 13 PTS and 10 REB. Noah Penda notches 10 PTS, 6 REB and 6 AST and 3 BLK.

Orlando holds off a strong push late by Philadelphia and improves to 3-1 in Las Vegas.

items.title: Hey America.
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Hey America.

Watching the World Cup and thinking about American sports excellence.

It’s on the basketball court.USA has won the last 5 Olympics in a row

USAB have gone on a 20 year ass whoopin tour on the basketball court🏀 

In the worlds 2nd most popular sport.

I know why we don’t celebrate it✊🏽

items.title: 114-98 loss for the Pacers against the Wolves. So many sloppy defensive moments from about everyone. 20 points and 9 rebounds for Jalen Slawson (and 7 fouls + 6 turnovers). 8 points, 6 rebounds, 8 assists for Braden Smith (and 4 turnovers). 1-3 are the summer Pacers. One to go.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: 114-98 loss for the Pacers against the Wolves. So many sloppy defensive moments from about everyone. 20 points and 9 rebounds for Jalen Slawson (and 7 fouls + 6 turnovers). 8 points, 6 rebounds, 8 assists for Braden Smith (and 4 turnovers). 1-3 are the summer Pacers. One to go.

items.title: Summer Pacers lose to Timberwolves 114-98.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Summer Pacers lose to Timberwolves 114-98.

Slawson finished with 20-9-3-4b, Taelon Peter scored 9 and Braden Smith added 8-6-8.

They're now 1-3, dropping their last three. Just one game left. TBA

items.title: Timing of Argentina's winners in the knockout rounds:
items.author: Zach Kram
items.body_excerpt:
Timing of Argentina's winners in the knockout rounds:

vs. Cape Verde: 111th minute
vs. Egypt: 92nd minute (stoppage time)
vs. Switzerland: 112th minute
vs. England: 92nd minute (stoppage time)

They haven't led after 90 minutes of any knockout game. But they're in the final.
